history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing right. The cell ahead (C02) is lava, so moving forward is deadly. I need to go around. Turning right will make me face down, and the cell below (B03) is safe floor. From there I can navigate towards the goal at D04.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing down. The cell directly ahead (B03) is safe floor. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at D04. From there, I can turn left to face right and navigate through the safe path (B03 → C03 → D03 → D04).
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column B, facing down. The cell ahead (B04) is safe, but moving there wouldn't help because to reach the goal at D04 I would need to cross C04, which is lava. Instead, I should turn left to face right and move through the safe cells C03 and D03, then turn right and move down to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 03, column B, facing right. The cell ahead (C03) is safe floor. I can move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 03, column C, facing right. The cell ahead (D03) is safe. Moving there will put me directly above the goal at D04. Then I will need to turn right to face down and move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column D, facing right. The cell ahead (E03) is a wall. The goal is at D04, which is below me. I need to turn right to face down, then move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column D, facing down. The goal is directly ahead at D04. I will move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
